nasb.text: He sent young men of the sons of Israel, and they offered burnt offerings and sacrificed young bulls as peace offerings to the Lord.

esv.text: And he sent young men of the people of Israel, who offered burnt offerings and sacrificed peace offerings of oxen to the Lord.

cnv.text: 又派了以色列人中的青年人去獻燔祭，又向耶和華殺牛獻為平安祭。

ccb.text: 他又吩咐以色列的青年去给耶和华献燔祭，又献上公牛作平安祭。
